design_philosophy: A mysterious, enigmatic web-based studio site for Vitruvian Construct. It introduces the brand, teases upcoming games, showcases concept art, and funnels visitors to community channels. The site feels like an artifact from a strange world, blending a renaissance-meets-machine motif with occult undertones. Handcrafted sketchbook energy meets arcane mechanical precision.

usage.headings: Use Cormorant Garamond for all primary headings. Keep font weight moderate (e.g., font-medium or font-semibold) to maintain elegant renaissance feel.
usage.body: Use JetBrains Mono for body copy, tags, timestamps, and lore fragments to give a mechanical, typewriter, or blueprint energy.
usage.overline: Use JetBrains Mono, text-xs, uppercase, wide tracking (tracking-[0.2em]) and dim gold color.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use asymmetry and grid overlaps to create visual tension. Components should feel like fragments of a larger mechanical artifact.

surfaces_and_borders.cards: bg-[#12141a] border border-[#c5a977]/20 rounded-none relative overflow-hidden
surfaces_and_borders.mechanical_accents: Before/after pseudo-elements for crosshairs (+), corner brackets (⌜ ⌟), and 1px lines extending beyond containers.

buttons.primary: bg-transparent border border-[#c5a977] text-[#c5a977] px-6 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-mono hover:bg-[#c5a977] hover:text-[#090b10] transition-colors duration-300
buttons.secondary: text-[#a39f93] hover:text-[#e6dfd1] underline decoration-[#c5a977]/30 hover:decoration-[#c5a977] underline-offset-4 transition-all duration-300 font-mono text-sm

components.navigation: Sticky glassmorphic header (bg-[#090b10]/80 backdrop-blur-xl). Logo on left (Cormorant Garamond, text-xl), nav links center (JetBrains Mono, text-sm, uppercase).
components.inputs: bg-transparent border-b border-[#c5a977]/30 focus:border-[#c5a977] outline-none text-[#e6dfd1] font-mono py-2 rounded-none focus:ring-0
components.tags: border border-[#8a9a86]/30 text-[#8a9a86] px-2 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider inline-block

animation_and_motion.hover: Subtle glows, text color shifts, and brackets moving slightly outward.
animation_and_motion.scroll: Fade in and slight upward translation (y: 20 -> 0) using framer-motion.
animation_and_motion.marquee: Very slow, smooth drift with JetBrains Mono. Use for 'TRANSMISSION FEED // LORE FRAGMENT // SYSTEM ACTIVE' with low opacity (#a39f93/20).

media.image_treatment: Images should have a dark, moody overlay (e.g., bg-black/40) or mix-blend-luminosity to integrate with the dark theme. Borders should be 1px solid subtle gold.

urls.description: Dark grunge texture to be used as a low-opacity background overlay or hero background.
Albino axolotl swimming in a dark tank, representing the 'Irresponsible Axolotl' featured project.
Renaissance style sketch of two hands reaching out. Use in Concept Art Archive or Manifesto.
Close up of pencil sketch lines. Use in Concept Art Archive.
Hands holding a sketchbook. Use in Concept Art Archive.
Drawing of a woman sitting down. Use in Concept Art Archive.

sections.name: Hero / Entry Sequence
sections.structure: Full-screen min-h-screen. Center aligned content. Background image with heavy dark overlay. Logo text prominent.
sections.elements: Tagline: 'Enter the Construct'. Primary CTA button. Decorative mechanical borders.

sections.name: Studio Manifesto
sections.structure: Asymmetrical 12-column grid. Text spanning 6 columns. Overlapping image (hands sketch) on the right side.

sections.name: Featured Project: Irresponsible Axolotl
sections.structure: Control Room Grid. Main image spans 2 columns, info spans 2 columns.
sections.elements: Key art image, 1-paragraph pitch, dev status tags (e.g., 'STATUS: PRE-ALPHA'), wishlist/support CTAs.

sections.name: Concept Art Archive
sections.structure: Masonry or Bento grid for images.
sections.elements: Category filters (environments, characters, etc.) as monospace tags. Grid of sketches.

sections.name: Signals / Transmission Feed
sections.structure: Vertical timeline with a single 1px mechanical line on the left. Cryptic field logs.

sections.name: World Fragments / Lore Teasers
sections.structure: Scattered text blocks. Large blockquotes in Cormorant Garamond. Floating symbols.

sections.name: Community + Support
sections.elements: Discord, Twitter/X, Kickstarter, Patreon. Styled as 'inner circle invitations'.

sections.name: Newsletter / Email Signup
sections.elements: Input form, submit button. Mechanical terminal style.

sections.name: Footer
sections.structure: Simple, border-t border-dim_gold/20. Large symbolic typography.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets 4.5:1 ratio against dark background. The dim gold and bone white have sufficient contrast against #090b10.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements must include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the JSON design strictly. Use the provided colors, fonts, and images.
Set up Tailwind config to include the custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, JetBrains Mono) and custom colors.
Implement the layout as a single-page scrolling experience with smooth scrolling (e.g., Lenis if possible, or standard CSS smooth scroll).
Build the admin panel as a separate route (e.g., /admin) with a simple password-protection (mocked or simple auth) to manage projects/art/updates.
Ensure all components use standard HTML/Tailwind for layout and Shadcn for interactive logic (customized to match the dark/mechanical theme).
Include 'data-testid' attributes on all clickable elements.
